plugins.name: game-engines
plugins.description: Build 2D and 3D browser games with Phaser 3, Three.js, and Capacitor for iOS

plugins.name: asset-pipeline
plugins.description: Refine and process 2D game assets: animated spritesheets, Aseprite parsing, sprite-sheet pipelines, and pixel-grid snapping

plugins.name: game-features
plugins.description: Add game features like real-time multiplayer, co-op, and PvP

plugins.name: game-craft
plugins.description: Make browser games have taste — the build order and craft that separate a tech demo from something fun

plugins.name: generate
plugins.description: Generate game-ready assets — images, video, audio, 3D, characters, cinematics, sprites, voiceover — with the vg generate CLI

plugins.name: tooling
plugins.description: Developer tooling for deploying games, frontend testing, and skill authoring
